5.465*exp(0.1491*sin(0.564*x_1 + 1.4133) + 0.0186*tanh(5.2332*x_2 - 8.2041)) - 0.0418*sin(13.9796*sin(0.4938*x_1 - 8.0345) - 0.9516*sin(2.2004*x_2 - 5.4289) + 16.9591) - 6.5906

-0.0851*sin(7.2761*sin(0.564*x_1 + 1.4133) + 0.9094*tanh(5.2332*x_2 - 8.2041) - 21.8618) - 0.1654*sinh(-6.7488*sin(0.4938*x_1 - 8.0345) + 0.4594*sin(2.2004*x_2 - 5.4289) - 6.1775) + 1.3997
